Prompt line 157: 'if two states cannot be cleanly distinguished from existing metadata, do not fake the distinction'. Prompt lines 217-229: 6 targeted coverage items. Acceptance criteria lines 288-298: 7 measurable gates. Preflight §7 Phase B line 206: 'explicit matrix of empty/populated states + tests'. No full state-matrix explosion required — prompt line 230 confirms 'keep this targeted'.

runtime_mode is the stable FE discriminator (narrative_runtime_policy.py:147). Prompt line 266: 'Only distinguish states the backend metadata genuinely supports'. InsightsPanel.tsx lines 70-76: severity/confidence sort logic is untouched by this sprint — no client-side re-ranking. No emitted reasoning changes from Intelligence Core.

All in-scope files are FE-only: frontend/app/types/analysis.ts, frontend/app/services/analysis.ts, frontend/app/results/page.tsx, frontend/app/components/insights/InsightsPanel.tsx. None appear in SOP §3 Intelligence Core list. Prompt lines 202-210: 'No backend code changes, no new DTO fields, no changes to narrative generation policy'.
Prompt scope targets no tooling directories. All governed sprint files are under frontend/. No .codex/, .vscode/, or AGENTS.md involvement.
